svg.aria-label: MoRAM hero diagram: a transformer with a parametric memory bank per attention/MLP module, growing little by little across tasks via per-token routing, with sparse top-k selection and pruning.
svg.text: MoRAM: Learning Mixture of Rank-1 Associative Memories Little by Little
for Continual Post-Training of Large Pre-Trained Models

g.text: × L layers, each with own banks
tokens semantically similar to earlier tasks → routed to existing slots
